live_matches.match_title: Bayern Munich vs Heidenheim - MD 32 - 2 May 2026
live_matches.description: Bayern Munich welcome Heidenheim in a Bundesliga clash, with the champions aiming to continue their dominant run at the top of the table. Heidenheim will look to stay disciplined and frustrate Bayern’s attacking firepower in what promises to be an intense encounter. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
